addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Forms package
Added administrator component for creating and managing unlimited forms
Added multilingual form builder with language-aware field editing
Added support for Text, Email, Textarea, Select, Radio, Checkbox, Checkbox Group, Hidden, Heading, Free Text and Date/Time fields
Added built-in field validation with multilingual validation messages
Added administrator and user email notifications
Added HTML and Plain Text email support
Added Reply-To, CC, BCC and custom recipient support
Added multilingual success and error messages
Added submission manager with search, filters and CSV export
Added form backup and restore tools
Added Proof of Work anti-spam protection
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: Built using modern Joomla 6 MVC architecture and PHP 8.2+
Optimized frontend rendering for responsive and high-performance websites
Improved multilingual editing workflow with dedicated language selector
Simplified administrator interface following the DevArt UI architecture
Optimized submission processing and database queries for large datasets
Improved import/export reliability for production deployments

security.item: Added ACL support for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added SQL parameter binding for all database operations
Added server-side validation and safe output escaping
Added configurable anti-spam protection with Proof of Work, Google reCAPTCHA and Cloudflare Turnstile
Added submission rate limiting and secure email processing
Built for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+ using modern namespaces and production-safe architecture

note.item: Initial public stable release of DevArt Forms for Joomla 6
Built for Joomla 6 only with PHP 8.2+
Supports multilingual forms and production-ready deployments
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
